state.location: Sunken Playhouse causeway, ~100 ft from proscenium pillar, marsh approach
state.weather: Mid-morning sun, mist thinning, frogs gone silent

deadlines.name: Ashworth office meeting — Song 3 emotional projection
Book Starling return shows (3 slots offered)
Follow up on Torren's 3 patron inquiries

spells.name: Protector's Surge
spells.effect: +4 to all ability scores (and corresponding modifier increases). Only one creature affected at a time — casting again on a new target ends the previous.
spells.limitation: Only works when Cookie is in a genuinely unsafe situation and the target is actively defending her.

spells.name: Healing Dance
spells.duration: 3 rounds (concentration — CHA-based via Dance Dance Revolution)
spells.description: Cookie performs a gossip song praising nature and love, based on one of Ignis's famous 'Four Seasons' series. Requires Performance roll to initiate — if fail, Cookie falls prone and the spell fails.
spells.effect_during: 25% max HP heal per round to all allies within 30 ft for duration of performance.
spells.effect_on_completion: 100% max HP heal to all allies within 30 ft. All healed allies gain Regeneration buff: 10% max HP per round for 1 hour.
spells.failure_initiation: Performance roll fail = Cookie falls prone, spell does not begin.
spells.failure_concentration: If concentration is broken before round 3 completes, only the per-round 25% healing applies. No completion heal or regen buff.
spells.limitation: Requires dancing (triggers Dance Inspiration d12 on performance checks). Cookie cannot attack or move more than 5 ft per round while channeling.
spells.ember_enhanced: 10× healing values when Ember is active. Disabled if Ember nullified.

spells.name: Stunning Kicks
spells.range: 60 ft (teleport to each enemy, return to original position)
spells.duration: Instant (stun lasts 2 rounds guaranteed, STR/CON save to escape starting round 3)
spells.description: Cookie teleports to each enemy within 60 ft and attempts a kick before returning to her original position. Each kick requires a DEX-based attack roll (d20 + DEX mod + prof). On hit: target is stunned for 2 rounds (no save), must make STR or CON save to escape starting on round 3.
spells.attack_roll: d20 + DEX mod + prof per target
spells.on_hit: 1d6 bludgeoning + stun 2 rounds (guaranteed), STR/CON save to escape round 3+
spells.ember_enhanced: Disabled if Ember nullified (teleport component requires Ember).

spells.name: Dance of Dispel
spells.duration: 2 rounds (concentration — CHA-based via Dance Dance Revolution)
spells.description: Requires Performance roll to initiate — if fail, Cookie falls prone. Cookie dances for 2 rounds with concentration. On successful completion: clears ALL buffs and Ember effects on the battlefield that do not originate from Cookie, within 120 ft. Only takes effect after successfully maintaining concentration for full 2 rounds.
spells.failure_initiation: Performance roll fail = Cookie falls prone, spell does not begin.
spells.failure_concentration: If concentration breaks before round 2, no effect.

spells.name: Planar Waltz
spells.duration: 2 rounds casting, buff/debuff lasts until end of combat
spells.description: Requires Performance roll to initiate — if fail, Cookie falls prone. Cookie dances for 2 rounds with concentration. On successful completion: all enemies are locked to the physical plane (cannot go ethereal/phase). All allies gain ability to go ethereal as an extra action and deal +5 spirit damage (+50 if Ember active). Any undead, spirit, demon, or extradimensional enemy that dies during this dance suffers true death (cannot be resurrected/reformed). Effects persist until end of combat.
spells.failure_initiation: Performance roll fail = Cookie falls prone, spell does not begin.
spells.failure_concentration: If concentration breaks before round 2, no effect.
spells.ember_enhanced: Spirit damage increases from +5 to +50 when Ember active. Disabled if Ember nullified.

spells.name: Dragon's Roar Dance
spells.duration: 2 rounds casting, buff lasts until end of combat
spells.description: Requires Performance roll to initiate — if fail, Cookie falls prone. Cookie picks one element from a colored dragon: fire, acid, ice, water, or lightning. She dances for 2 rounds channeling that dragon. On successful completion: all allies gain +10 damage of chosen element type (+100 if Ember active) until end of combat. Only takes effect after successfully maintaining concentration for full 2 rounds.
spells.failure_initiation: Performance roll fail = Cookie falls prone, spell does not begin.
spells.failure_concentration: If concentration breaks before round 2, no effect.
spells.ember_enhanced: Elemental damage buff increases from +10 to +100 when Ember active. Disabled if Ember nullified.

class_features.name: Dance Inspiration
class_features.description: When Cookie incorporates dancing into a Performance check (not just singing or speaking), she rolls an additional d12 and adds it to the total. This represents the Dancer class's core identity — movement as magic.
class_features.mechanical_effect: Performance check while dancing: d20 + d12 + modifier (instead of d20 + modifier). Singing/speaking-only Performance uses d20 + modifier as normal.

class_features.name: Dancer's Tai Chi
class_features.description: A DEX-based martial art created by Cookie during her first real combat encounter. Flowing kicks that look like dance — improvised, instinctive, entirely her own. High risk, high reward — Cookie's combat performance inspires allies or leaves her vulnerable.

mechanics.attack: 1 kick per round. DEX-based (d20 + DEX mod + prof to hit). 1d6 bludgeoning damage. Always causes PRONE on hit.
mechanics.start_of_turn: Performance roll (d20 + d12 + mod, since dancing). DC 12. SUCCESS: all allies who can see Cookie gain 1 free attack this round. FAIL: Cookie falls prone and loses her turn.
mechanics.end_of_turn: Performance roll (d20 + d12 + mod, since dancing). DC 12. SUCCESS: Cookie gains 75% dodge chance on all enemy attacks until her next turn. FAIL: Cookie falls prone.
mechanics.design_note: Two performance rolls per turn makes Cookie the most swingy combatant possible. On good rolls she's a force multiplier. On bad rolls she's on the ground. Prone triggers the class-wide Ember Last Stand effect (see class_rule: Ember Last Stand).

class_features.name: Dancer's Punishment
class_features.description: The Dancer class punishes failed performances. Any time Cookie fails a Performance check — whether in combat, casting, social, or any other context — she falls prone. This is a core class-wide penalty, not tied to any specific ability.
class_features.mechanical_effect: Failed Performance check (any context) = Cookie falls prone immediately. This applies universally: Tai Chi combat rolls, spell initiation rolls, social performance rolls, etc.

class_features.name: Action Exclusivity: Tai Chi vs Dance Spells
class_features.description: Dancer's Tai Chi and dance spells (Healing Dance, Dance of Dispel, Planar Waltz, Dragon's Roar Dance) are separate actions that cannot be performed simultaneously. Cookie must choose one or the other on her turn — she cannot kick and cast a dance spell in the same action.
class_features.mechanical_effect: Tai Chi and dance spells are mutually exclusive. Cookie may use Tai Chi OR a dance spell on a given turn, never both. Switching between them requires ending one before starting the other (e.g., stopping Tai Chi to begin a multi-round dance spell, or waiting for a dance spell to complete before resuming Tai Chi).

class_features.name: Ember Last Stand
class_features.description: The Ember's primal survival mechanic. Whenever Cookie is prone or paralyzed — regardless of how she got there (failed Performance, enemy attack, spell, trap, anything) — the Ember radiates outward and hijacks humanoid enemies' instincts. Female enemies mock her instead of finishing her. Male enemies attempt to mate with her instead of killing her. On a primal level, the Ember decides humiliation or impregnation is better than death. This is a last-ditch save, not a power fantasy — Cookie is genuinely vulnerable and the outcomes are degrading, but she survives.
class_features.mechanical_effect: TRIGGER: Cookie is prone or paralyzed, Ember is active (not nullified), enemies are humanoid. FEMALE ENEMIES: gain Ridicule bonus — skip their kill action to mock/taunt Cookie instead of finishing her. MALE ENEMIES: gain Lust bonus — must make STR save vs Cookie's spell DC or spend their turn attempting to grapple/mate instead of attacking. On failed save, the male succeeds in grappling and Cookie must escape or be rescued. LIMITATIONS: Does NOT work on non-humanoids, undead, constructs, or any creature immune to charm/mental effects. Disabled entirely if Ember is nullified.
class_features.design_note: This is the Ember's last-ditch biological defense. It turns Cookie's vulnerability into a survival tool by exploiting humanoid instincts. The consequences are real and degrading — she's either humiliated or assaulted — but she's alive. Better off shamed than dead.

class_features.name: The Great User
class_features.description: Bifurcates every Heartstring-touched humanoid by gender x disposition. The dominant social-mechanics layer from L9 onward.
class_features.mechanical_effect: FEMALE humanoid + felt Heartstring + disposition <= neutral: antagonistic. Challenges Cookie to duels, betrays in combat, actively tries to steal her friends and male admirers. MALE humanoid + disposition >= neutral toward Cookie: protective. Asks what she needs and buys it. In combat, gains the option to intercept any attack aimed at Cookie — counts as an automatic critical hit on the intercepting NPC. DM must check this every scene that involves Heartstring-touched NPCs.

class_features.name: Fans Out of Control
class_features.description: Ember enhancement on top of The Great User. Active only while Ember is available.
class_features.mechanical_effect: MALE humanoid + felt Heartstring + disposition < neutral: stalker. Attempts kidnap or sleep-time impregnation. FEMALE + felt Heartstring: assassins, show up to kill her. MALE + disposition >= neutral + felt Heartstring: secret guard network — quietly watches her location, pops up to fight when she is ambushed. EFFECT: Cookie rolls for ambush even in safe locations during sleep, but always has at least one nearby protector who arrives to help fight. Disabled if Ember is nullified.

class_features.name: Low-Wisdom Loss-of-Control Quirk
class_features.description: Cookie's WIS 7 turns alcohol and drug interactions into real risk events, not flavor.
class_features.mechanical_effect: When alcohol or drugs are offered, Cookie must make a WIS save (DC scales with potency, baseline DC 12 for tavern alcohol) to refuse. On failed save the player loses control of Cookie for the duration. If Cookie is drugged or blacked out from alcohol, an attempt scene fires: female aggressor = assassination attempt, male aggressor = impregnation attempt. The Great User intervention: any nearby Heartstring-touched friendly male humanoid can attempt to thwart. If thwart fails, Cookie is treated as prone and Ember Last Stand triggers (female mocks, male must STR save vs spell DC to be stopped). DM MUST roll the WIS save when drinks/drugs are offered, not narrate around it.

ember_passive.name: Heartstring
ember_passive.description: Cookie's voice and movements carry emotional undertones that bypass rational thought. When she speaks, sings, or dances, listeners feel what she feels — joy makes them smile involuntarily, sorrow brings tears, excitement raises pulses. She cannot turn this off. It's why tavern patrons always tipped her mother extra when Cookie was cleaning nearby, humming to herself. It's also why men stare — the Ankuspawn beauty aura PLUS emotional bleed is devastating.
ember_passive.mechanical_effect: +2 to all Charisma-based checks (Persuasion, Performance, Deception, Intimidation) when speaking or performing. Listeners within 30 ft must make WIS save DC 12 or have their emotional state shifted one step toward Cookie's current emotion. Passive — always active, cannot be suppressed.

ember_active.name: Chorus of One
ember_active.description: Cookie can project her voice as if an entire troupe were performing — harmonies, countermelodies, percussion rhythms, all from her solo voice. The sound fills a space unnaturally, resonating off walls and through bodies. She can target the resonance to bolster allies (healing warmth, courage, pain suppression) or disorient enemies (dissonant frequencies, nausea, vertigo). She discovered this on her 18th birthday when she sang happy birthday to herself in her room and the entire inn heard a full choir.
ember_active.mechanical_effect: Bonus action. 60 ft range. Choose one: (A) BOLSTER — up to 3 allies gain 1d8+CHA temp HP and advantage on next saving throw; or (B) DISORIENT — up to 3 enemies make CON save DC 13 or suffer disadvantage on attacks for 1 round and lose 10 ft movement. Uses per day: 3 (scales to 5 at level 6, 7 at level 10).

ember_surge.name: The Golden Note
ember_surge.description: Cookie opens her mouth and sings a single, impossibly pure note — a sound that doesn't belong in the mortal world. Gold light pulses from her throat and eyes. The note resonates with every living thing in range, forcing a moment of absolute emotional truth. Allies feel unshakeable courage and clarity. Enemies feel their deepest fears and guilts surface. Objects vibrate. Glass shatters. The air itself hums for minutes afterward. This is a fragment of what Kenji's Ember can do at full power — projected through a dancer's voice instead of a warrior's blade. It leaves Cookie shaking, voiceless, and exhausted afterward.
ember_surge.mechanical_effect: Action. 120 ft radius. ALL allies: healed 3d10+CHA, cured of fear/charm, gain advantage on all rolls for 1 round. ALL enemies: WIS save DC 15 or frightened for 1 minute (repeat save each turn). Enemies who fail by 5+ are also stunned for 1 round. After use: Cookie gains 1 level of exhaustion, loses her voice for 1 hour (no verbal spells or Chorus of One), and Heartstring passive is suppressed until she completes a short rest.
ember_surge.exhaustion_cost: 1 level of exhaustion + 1 hour voiceless + Heartstring suppressed until short rest

pc_abilities.ember_theme_desc: Cookie's Ember shaped itself around her lifelong love of dance and music — the way she hums while scrubbing floors, the way her body moves to rhythms only she can hear, the way she's always wanted to make people FEEL something. The Ember amplifies voice, sound, emotional projection, and performance magic. It is who she was always going to be, just... more.
